11055.title: Sanditon
11055.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

16044.title: Sanditon
16044.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

47010.title: Sanditon
47010.description: Charlotte sets out to avoid Sidney, until an accident forces them together and to reappraise each other. When Tom brings a new doctor to the town, he and Lady Denham clash and Clara makes a bold move in her bid to outplay Sir Edward and Esther.
